buildings.name: Small House
buildings.description: Cozy single-room dwelling with bed and storage

buildings.name: Cozy Cottage
buildings.description: Comfortable home with separate living and sleeping areas

buildings.name: Stone House
buildings.description: Durable dwelling with excellent insulation and stone construction

buildings.name: Longhouse
buildings.description: Large communal dwelling for extended families or groups

buildings.name: Workshop
buildings.description: Crafting building with workstations and storage for materials

buildings.name: Barn
buildings.description: Large agricultural building for storage and animal husbandry

buildings.name: Storage Shed
buildings.description: Simple storage structure for basic item storage

buildings.name: Guard Tower
buildings.description: Defensive structure with visibility and height advantage

buildings.name: Moonlit Treehouse
buildings.description: A serene treehouse blending with nature, using living wood and crystal

buildings.name: Crystal Meditation Bower
buildings.description: A serene meditation space with crystal floors and living wood walls, infused with moonlight.

buildings.name: Elven Living Wood Library
buildings.description: A serene library woven from living wood and crystal, filled with ancient tomes and bathed in natural light.

buildings.name: Enchanted Elven Forge
buildings.description: A mystical workshop blending nature and magic, carved from living wood and crystal

buildings.name: Starlight Sanctuary
buildings.description: An elven sanctuary infused with celestial energy, using living wood and crystal for harmony with nature.

buildings.name: Centaurs' Stable
buildings.description: A spacious single-story stable with open design for centaurs

buildings.name: Centaur Clan Hall
buildings.description: Spacious meeting hall with open design and ramps

buildings.name: Open Smithy
buildings.description: A spacious workshop for centaur smiths with open work areas and storage

buildings.name: Centaurs' Training Hall
buildings.description: Spacious single-story training facility with ramps and open movement areas

buildings.name: Centaur War Council Chamber
buildings.description: A spacious chamber for strategic meetings.

buildings.name: Celestial Prayer Spire
buildings.description: A vertical sanctuary for divine communion with radiant light.

buildings.name: Choir Tower
buildings.description: A vertical tower with sacred geometry and divine light

buildings.name: Celestial Archives
buildings.description: A sacred vault for storing divine knowledge, illuminated by starlight.

buildings.name: Celestial Meditation Sanctum
buildings.description: A towering meditative space with divine light and sacred geometry.

buildings.name: Folded Manor
buildings.description: A reality-bending structure with impossible geometry

buildings.name: Chronodream Spire
buildings.description: A non-Euclidean tower folding reality into itself, constructed from frozen time and crystallized dreams

buildings.name: Tesseract Court of Dimensional Weave
buildings.description: A non-Euclidean court with impossible geometry and dimensional folding.

buildings.name: Between-Space Workshop
buildings.description: A workshop existing in folded dimensions, allowing crafting across realities

buildings.name: Runeforge Hall
buildings.description: A precision-engineered forge hall of carved stone and forged steel, where runic crystal channels forge-heat into masterwork crafting.

buildings.name: Stonekin Hold
buildings.description: A solid residential hold carved from stone, with forged steel doors and geometric precision in every block.

buildings.name: Debtkeeper's Vault
buildings.description: A reinforced commercial vault of carved stone and forged steel, sealed with runic crystal locks for secure trade and storage.

buildings.name: Assay Chamber
buildings.description: A geometric research chamber with runic crystal floors that refract forge-light for precise mineral assay and metallurgical study.

buildings.name: Hall of Measured Days
buildings.description: A solemn spiritual hall of carved stone with runic crystal floors and ceiling, where Dvergar commune with ancestral echoes etched in rune-script.

buildings.name: Frost Hall of the Giants
buildings.description: A massive residential hall carved from glacial ice-stone, where frost giants sleep in cavernous rooms shaped by primordial cold. The walls groan with ancient memories of the first winter.

buildings.name: Primordial Forge Pit
buildings.description: A sunken forge of volcanic basalt where fire giants channel the world's deep heat to smelt metals that no mortal flame could touch. Steam and sulphur fill the air.

buildings.name: Rune Circle of the Old Powers
buildings.description: A ring of towering standing stones etched with primordial runes predating written language. Jotnar gather here to commune with elemental forces and invoke the memories of creation.

buildings.name: War Cairn of the Frost-Blooded
buildings.description: A fortress of glacial stone where Jotnar warriors train in the ancient combat arts of giants. The cairn marks both a place of battle-readiness and a monument to fallen champions.

buildings.name: The Primordial Throne
buildings.description: A colossal seat of elemental power where the mightiest Jotnar chieftain communes directly with the forces that shaped the world. The throne pulses with the heartbeat of creation itself.

buildings.name: Anchor of Fixed Moments
buildings.description: A spiritual nexus of crystallized time where dragons worship the immutable points in history. The structure exists simultaneously across multiple temporal strata, its walls shimmering between past and present.

buildings.name: Hoard Nexus of Accumulated Aeons
buildings.description: A vast commercial vault sheathed in dragonscale, where dragons store not merely gold but collected experiences, stolen futures, and the compressed wealth of collapsed timelines.

buildings.name: Memory Spire of Ten Dimensions
buildings.description: A crystalline tower of memory-crystal that stores the accumulated knowledge of dragon centuries. Researchers here access not just recorded fact but living experiential memory encoded in the crystal lattice.

buildings.name: Roost of the Eternal Flame
buildings.description: A vast obsidian residential chamber built to the scale of dragons, where the great wyrms sleep atop beds of volcanic glass, their dreams bleeding into the surrounding stone as temporal echoes.

buildings.name: Council Aerie of the Ancient Accord
buildings.description: A monumental military council chamber of elder-stone where dragon elders gather to deliberate war, judge violations of the Ancient Accord, and train the next generation of wyrm-warriors in the arts of temporal combat.
